economic_notes: Wahta Economic Development GP Inc. and Wahta Economic Development LP accounted for on modified equity basis. Investment portfolio held with Scotia Asset Management totaling ~$27.9M carrying value. COVID-19 noted as ongoing risk to operations.
notes: Fiscal year is 2021 not 2024. Two government business enterprises (Wahta Economic Development GP Inc. and Wahta Economic Development LP) accounted for on modified equity basis rather than full consolidation - equity value $270,650. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements. Current liabilities not separately disclosed on balance sheet extract provided. Total government transfers calculated as Provincial ($777,288) + Federal ($3,794,573) = $4,571,861. ISC funding identified from accounts receivable note and deferred revenue note as primary federal funder; federal government transfers amount used as ISC proxy. Expenses_salaries_total taken from segmented information total salaries line ($1,922,582). Community and Economic Development expense ($414,173) includes Investments ($122,521) as separate line item.
